label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6

extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus held off a late chase from ROGLIČ Primož after surviving a 7-minute breakaway and crosswinds that shattered the peloton
tactical_patterns: BOL Jetse took intermediate sprint from breakaway to secure bonus money before pack engulfed group, showing calculated energy management.
Movistar pace-making on crosswind section dropped ELISSONDE Kenny from red jersey at 28kph winds, targeting GC not stage.
NARVÁEZ Jhonatan and CARAPAZ Richard provided Ecuadorian escort for BERNAL Egan on final climb, revealing Ineos dual-leader structure.
ROGLIČ Primož attacked final climb without team support, sailing past others late, indicating comfort conserving earlier in crosswinds.

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Won from 7-minute break after BOL departed, then survived final climb alone showing rare breakaway-climber endurance blend
rider_signals.ELISSONDE Kenny: negative: Lost red jersey in crosswinds when Movistar accelerated, exposed as vulnerable without team protection in echelons
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: negative: Distanced in crosswinds alongside ELISSONDE, revealing poor positioning skills before mountain stages where he should excel
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Moved into red with late solo acceleration on climb, demonstrating tactical restraint in crosswinds then surgical finish
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: Animated chase on final climb and finished fifth, unexpected climbing form from sprinter suggests stage-hunting versatility
rider_signals.BAGIOLI Andrea: positive: Third place after following ROGLIČ's late move, showing opportunistic positioning behind stronger climber's acceleration
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: Finished 41 seconds down in chase group despite teammate VALVERDE also present, indicating Movistar protected both leaders
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: Required dual Ecuadorian domestique support but finished with leaders at 41 seconds, conservative ride suggests building form
